name: Neural Global Optimization via Iterative Refinement from Noisy Samples

description: arXiv:2604.03614v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Global optimization of black-box functions from noisy samples is a fundamental challenge in machine learning and scientific computing. Traditional methods such as Bayesian Optimization often converge to local minima on multi-modal functions, while gradient-free methods require many function evaluations. We present a novel neural approach...
author: Qusay Muzaffar, David Levin, Michael Werman
